_comment: LAYER 2 seed values. These get loaded into Gurleen's SystemConfig database table on the first seed run. After initial seed, these values are edited via the admin dashboard — this file is NOT the live source of truth, just the starting values.
_security: Every key MUST start with 'public.' — the /api/system-config/public endpoint only returns keys with that prefix. This is the convention that prevents accidentally exposing secrets. If you need to add a sensitive key (API secret, webhook signing key, etc.), do NOT put it in this file — put it directly in the database with NO public. prefix.
_update_process: Editing this file only affects NEW seeds (fresh databases). Editing values on an existing live database means logging into the admin dashboard and saving there — the seed does not overwrite existing rows. See backend/prisma/seed.ts for the exact upsert behavior.
